'''gadhoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadcut|roadcut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadcut|roadcut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gadhoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædheheth|gædheheth]] || [[word:gædhehej|gædhehej]] || [[word:gædhehesh|gædhehesh]] || [[word:gædhehe|gædhehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhodhohoth|gadhodhohoth]] || [[word:gadhodhohoj|gadhodhohoj]] || [[word:gadhodhohosh|gadhodhohosh]] || [[word:gadhodhoho|gadhodhoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhohoth|gadhohoth]] || [[word:gadhohoj|gadhohoj]] || [[word:gadhohosh|gadhohosh]] || [[word:gadhoho|gadhoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhofhoth|gadhofhoth]] || [[word:gadhofhoj|gadhofhoj]] || [[word:gadhofhosh|gadhofhosh]] || [[word:gadhofhof|gadhofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadhohotho|gadhohotho]] || [[word:gadhohojo|gadhohojo]] || [[word:gadhohosho|gadhohosho]] || [[word:gadhohoko|gadhohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadhohoth|gadhohoth]] || [[word:gadhohoj|gadhohoj]] || [[word:gadhohosh|gadhohosh]] || [[word:gadhoho|gadhoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadhohothol|gadhohothol]] || [[word:gadhohojol|gadhohojol]] || [[word:gadhohoshol|gadhohoshol]] || [[word:gadhohokol|gadhohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadhohothotho|gadhohothotho]] || [[word:gadhohojojo|gadhohojojo]] || [[word:gadhohoshosho|gadhohoshosho]] || [[word:gadhohoko|gadhohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadhohothon|gadhohothon]] || [[word:gadhohojon|gadhohojon]] || [[word:gadhohoshon|gadhohoshon]] || [[word:gadhohokon|gadhohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadhohothoro|gadhohothoro]] || [[word:gadhohojoro|gadhohojoro]] || [[word:gadhohoshoro|gadhohoshoro]] || [[word:gadhohokoro|gadhohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
